buildings.name: Central Academic Block
buildings.description: Main teaching block with lecture halls, classrooms, and faculty cabins.

floors.description: Ground floor with reception and core classrooms.
Upper floor with labs and seminar rooms.

buildings.name: Administration Block
buildings.description: Admissions, accounts, examination, and registrar offices.

buildings.name: Engineering Block
buildings.description: Department classrooms and practical labs for engineering programs.

buildings.name: Library Learning Centre
buildings.description: Library, reading hall, and digital learning rooms.

floors.description: Book stacks, issue counter, and reading spaces.

buildings.name: Sports Complex
buildings.description: Indoor games hall, gym area, and sports administration rooms.

floors.description: Indoor sports facilities and support rooms.

landmarks.name: Main Gate
landmarks.description: Primary entrance gate of Sandip University Madhubani campus.

landmarks.name: Central Lawn
landmarks.description: Open lawn used for student activities and events.

landmarks.name: Hostel Shuttle Point
landmarks.description: Pickup and drop point for university shuttle vehicles.

bus_routes.description: Connects main gate, academic blocks, library, and sports complex.
Connects university campus with key city pickup points.
